---
title: "News"
---

::: {.page-header}
<div class="kicker">News</div>
# Recent updates
:::

::: {.content}
::: {.pub}
<div class="pub-title">Professional website launched at mesfingenie.com</div>
<div class="pub-meta">2026</div>
:::

::: {.pub}
<div class="pub-title">Guidance or Misdirection? published in Health Economics</div>
<div class="pub-meta">2026</div>
:::

::: {.pub}
<div class="pub-title">Decision tools integrated into the website</div>
<div class="pub-meta">eMANDEVA Decision Aid and Farming BCA Tool</div>
:::
:::
